objects.query: SELECT Id, Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryAuthority WHERE Name IN ('Health Protection Branch Ministry of Health', 'Public Health Act', 'Regulated Activities Regulation', 'BCCDC', 'Canadian Food Inspection Agency') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSRegulatoryAuthority'

SELECT Id, Name, Subject, Description, EffectiveFrom, RegulatoryAuthority.Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryCode WHERE RegulatoryAuthority.Name IN ('Health Protection Branch Ministry of Health', 'Public Health Act', 'Regulated Activities Regulation', 'BCCDC', 'Canadian Food Inspection Agency') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSRegulatoryCode'

SELECT Id, Name, Category__c, DataType, Criticality__c, InspectionQuestiontype__c, PHOCSParentId__c, PHOCSParentId__r.Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM AssessmentIndicatorDefinition WHERE Category__c IN ('General Requirements', 'Tanning', 'Tattoo & Body Piercing', 'Manicure and Pedicure', 'Laser', 'Permit to Operate Mobile Food Service', 'Construction of Mobile Food Premises', 'Shellfish Food Protection', 'Shellfish Food Safety Management', 'Menu Warning Requirement', 'RTE Meat Food Sources and Protection') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSAssessmentIndicatorDefinition' ORDER BY PHOCSParentId__c NULLS FIRST

SELECT Id, AssessmentIndDefinitionId, AssessmentIndDefinition.Name, AssessmentIndDefinition.Category__c, AssessmentIndDefinition.PHOCSParentId__r.Name, RegulatoryCodeId, RegulatoryCode.Name, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryCodeAssessmentInd WHERE AssessmentIndDefinition.Category__c IN ('General Requirements', 'Tanning', 'Tattoo & Body Piercing', 'Manicure and Pedicure', 'Laser', 'Permit to Operate Mobile Food Service', 'Construction of Mobile Food Premises', 'Shellfish Food Protection', 'Shellfish Food Safety Management', 'Menu Warning Requirement', 'RTE Meat Food Sources and Protection')

SELECT Id, Name, TaskType, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM AssessmentTaskDefinition WHERE Name IN ('General Requirements', 'Tanning', 'Tattoo & Body Piercing', 'Manicure and Pedicure', 'Laser', 'Permit to Operate Mobile Food Service', 'Construction of Mobile Food Premises', 'Shellfish Food Protection', 'Shellfish Food Safety Management', 'Menu Warning Requirement', 'RTE Meat Food Sources and Protection') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSAssessmentTaskDefinition'

SELECT Id, AssessmentTaskDefinitionId, AssessmentTaskDefinition.Name, AssessmentIndDefinitionId, AssessmentIndDefinition.Name, AssessmentIndDefinition.Category__c, AssessmentIndDefinition.PHOCSParentId__r.Name, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM AssessmentTaskIndDefinition WHERE AssessmentTaskDefinition.Name IN ('General Requirements', 'Tanning', 'Tattoo & Body Piercing', 'Manicure and Pedicure', 'Laser', 'Permit to Operate Mobile Food Service', 'Construction of Mobile Food Premises', 'Shellfish Food Protection', 'Shellfish Food Safety Management', 'Menu Warning Requirement', 'RTE Meat Food Sources and Protection')
